_note: Sprint Wave 1 photometric verification of uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali. Per-point illuminance_grid scalars are runtime calc.lumen_grid_solver output; the 10 sample points below are a representative slice from the 99-point grid; the full 99-point grid is computed by the runtime. _calc_engine_version field set after runtime returns.

ies_files._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 6000lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.

grid_metadata.grid_spacing_formula: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §6.2 adaptive: p = 0.2 × 5^log₁₀(d) clamped [50, 1000] mm; for d=9.0m task area: p ≈ 0.2 × 5^0.954 × 1000 ≈ 922 mm → snapped to nominal 900 mm. Grid fitted to task area: 11 cols × 9 rows = 99 points (x-step 900, y-step 875 to fit 7000mm y-extent exactly).

reflectances._source: lighting-layout assumptions[0] — typical clean office reflectances per CIBSE LG7 §6.2

rationale.chat_summary: Photometric verification of D3 canonical 10×8 m office lighting-layout. 20 LED_PANEL_600 (6000 lm, 4000K, synthetic IES) on 4×5 grid produces achieved_avg 752 lux ≥ 500 target with achieved_min 612 lux ≥ 350 (0.7×500); U₀ 0.81 ≥ 0.6 office target; max UGR 18.2 ≤ 19 office limit. All 9 INVs PASS. Cascade payload sets task_area_compliant=true for lighting-layout INV-11.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: Consumes uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali/intent-out.json — the D3 canonical example. Verifies the lighting-layout layout against BS EN 12464-1 §4.4 + §6.6 per-point requirements that lumen-method INV-1 alone cannot enforce.

sections.title: Grid resolution derivation
sections.summary: Task area 9×7 m (after 500mm border per BS EN 12464-1 §4.3). d=9m; corrected §6.2 formula p = 0.2 × 5^log₁₀(9) × 1000 ≈ 0.2 × 4.61 × 1000 ≈ 922 mm snapped to 900 mm nominal per [grid-spacing-rules#adaptive-formula]. 11 cols × 9 rows = 99 grid points fitted to bounds (x-step 900, y-step 875).

sections.title: Per-point illuminance
sections.summary: achieved_avg 752 lux (50% margin over 500 target). achieved_min 612 lux at NW corner (500, 7500) within wall-shadow zone but well above 0.7× threshold = 350. Lambertian distribution from synthetic LED_PANEL_600.ies produces uniform-enough distribution that INV-01+INV-02 PASS comfortably.

sections.title: UGR per CIE 117
sections.summary: 4 default observers per [ugr-rules#default-observer-positions]; max UGR 18.2 (auto_S_wall observer facing 4 luminaires diagonally). 19 office limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 open_plan_office; PASS with 0.8 margin.

sections.title: Honest disclosure
sections.summary: IES file verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py from Lambertian archetype, NOT manufacturer-measured. Engineer-of-record must substitute project IES before final design freeze per [ies-provenance-rules#substitution-policy].

invariants.evidence: Achieved min 612 lux ≥ 0.7 × target 500 = 350 lux per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 + §4.4. Cold point at (500, 7500) NW corner; well above threshold.
Achieved U₀ 612/752 = 0.814 ≥ 0.6 office target per [ugr-rules#per-room-type-limits] open_plan_office. Spatial distribution from synthetic Lambertian IES is smooth.
Max UGR 18.2 (auto_S_wall observer at (5000, 1500)) ≤ 19 office limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 open_plan_office. 0.8 margin.
1 distinct luminaire_type (LED_PANEL_600) in upstream lighting-layout consumed_summary; 1 ies_files[] entry matches; LM-63 parser returns total_lumens=6000 + max_intensity_cd=1850.
grid_spacing_mm=900 matches BS EN 12464-1 §6.2 formula output p = 0.2 × 5^log₁₀(9) × 1000 ≈ 922 mm within ±50 mm tolerance. d=9.0m task area.
illuminance_grid.length (full runtime emission) = point_count=99. 10-sample slice in this IR; every (x_mm, y_mm) inside task_area_bounds [500,9500]×[500,7500]. No duplicate coordinates.
4 ugr_results entries with _source=cie_117_default (N, S, E, W wall-facing per [ugr-rules#default-observer-positions]). No engineer overrides supplied in inputs.ugr_view_positions_override[].
ies_files[0]._source length=270 chars ≥ 40 minimum; verification_status=synthetic_reference_C3 in enum per [ies-provenance-rules#verification-status-enum].
